assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has a modern web browser or Node.js environment

developer_goal: Start building a real-time messaging application using PubNub's JavaScript SDK.

first_success.outcome: Developer can publish a message to a channel and receive it in real-time via subscription.
first_success.observable_signal: Console logs or UI updates showing the sent message and the received message event.

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Core SDKs
candidates.reason: Core SDKs cover multiple languages and platforms but the JavaScript SDK has the most detailed step-by-step onboarding and is recommended for quick prototyping.

candidates.name: Chat SDK
candidates.reason: Chat SDK is specialized and built on top of the JavaScript SDK; onboarding starts with the JavaScript SDK itself.

required_path.observable_result: Message received by listener and logged/displayed

prerequisites.description: Create a PubNub account and sign in to the Admin Portal.
Create an app in the Admin Portal to obtain publish and subscribe keys.
Have a JavaScript runtime environment: modern browser, Node.js (v18+), or React Native setup.

external_gates.description: Developer must create a PubNub account to access keys and dashboard.
Creating an app in the Admin Portal is required to obtain publish and subscribe keys.
Installing the JavaScript SDK via CDN or npm is required to use PubNub in code.
Initializing the PubNub client with valid keys and user ID is required to connect to the service.

platform_outcomes.description: Successfully send and receive a real-time message using the PubNub JavaScript SDK.

uncertainties.question: Has the machine-drafted PubNub route been independently shortest-path audited?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts and peer comparison must stay withheld until a human audit passes.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete a shortest-path audit against current official docs and mark verified only when evidence supports it.
